firstLabel: // Include directive: asks the preprocessor to load declarations/macros from another file.
secondLabel: // Include directive: asks the preprocessor to load declarations/macros from another file.

firstLabel: // Ifndef/define/endif guard: defines SENSOR_PLATFORM only when it was not already defined.
secondLabel: // Ifndef/define/endif guard: defines SENSOR_PLATFORM only when it was not already defined.

firstLabel: // Ifdef/else/endif branch: chooses a macro based on whether SENSOR_PLATFORM is defined.
secondLabel: // Ifdef/else/endif branch: chooses a macro based on whether SENSOR_PLATFORM is defined.

firstLabel: // Object-style macro definitions: simple name-to-value/text substitutions.
secondLabel: // Object-style macro definitions: simple name-to-value/text substitutions.

firstLabel: // Undef directive: removes the previous MODULE_NAME definition before redefining it.
secondLabel: // Undef directive: removes the previous MODULE_NAME definition before redefining it.

firstLabel: // If/elif/else/endif branch: selects exactly one BUFFER_BUCKET definition.
secondLabel: // If/elif/else/endif branch: selects exactly one BUFFER_BUCKET definition.

firstLabel: // Error directive: kept inactive so CDT can see the statement shape without failing the fixture.
secondLabel: // Error directive: kept inactive so CDT can see the statement shape without failing the fixture.

firstLabel: // Function-style macros: behave like parameterized text substitutions.
secondLabel: // Function-style macros: behave like parameterized text substitutions.

firstLabel: // Token-pasting macro: counter_##name creates identifiers such as counter_samples.
secondLabel: // Token-pasting macro: counter_##name creates identifiers such as counter_samples.

firstLabel: // Stringizing macro: #value turns the argument token into a string literal.
secondLabel: // Stringizing macro: #value turns the argument token into a string literal.

firstLabel: // Variadic macro: __VA_ARGS__ forwards the extra arguments.
secondLabel: // Variadic macro: __VA_ARGS__ forwards the extra arguments.

firstLabel: // Conditional macro definition: DIAGNOSTIC_FIELD expands to a different field declaration.
secondLabel: // Conditional macro definition: DIAGNOSTIC_FIELD expands to a different field declaration.

firstLabel: // Macro expansion inside a class declaration.
secondLabel: // Macro expansion inside a class declaration.

firstLabel: // Macro expansion creates a static counter declaration.
secondLabel: // Macro expansion creates a static counter declaration.

firstLabel: // CLAMP and BUFFER_CAPACITY are macro expansions inside a function body.
secondLabel: // LIMIT and BUFFER_CAPACITY are macro expansions inside a function body.

firstLabel: // SQUARE is a function-style macro expansion.
secondLabel: // SQUARE is a function-style macro expansion.

firstLabel: // These assignments use object-style macro expansions.
secondLabel: // These assignments use object-style macro expansions.

firstLabel: // TO_STRING stringizes BUFFER_CAPACITY instead of evaluating it as an integer.
secondLabel: // TO_STRING stringizes BUFFER_CAPACITY instead of evaluating it as an integer.
